gist.headline: M is for Manage
gist.blurb: M Assistant joins the chat. It handles the scheduling and task automation so you can get back to generating pixels.
gist.summary: Added M Assistant to the community apps list, offering conversational AI support for scheduling and task automation.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and integrate M Assistant for streamlined organization across apps and devices.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations Bee interacting with a new organizational tool. Since M Assistant is about scheduling/tasks, a clipboard or calendar metaphor works well. The 'M' identity can be represented by a helpful robot or a stylized letter block.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot hovering next to a helpful pixel robot holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) clipboard. The robot has a letter 'M' painted on its chest. Soft pastel gradient background with floating calendar icons. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cute and organized.
